text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Eishin Flash in a classroom
playing a card game with her friend.

text_block_list.name: Card Expert Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I win! Wheeew, that was close. I'd have lost if you
played that two turns ago. ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It's difficult to play this with all fifty-two cards.

text_block_list.name: Card Expert Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Do you play with a different number of cards in
Germany?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. However, the number of cards had nothing
to do with my loss. I lost due to my own mistake.
It will not happen next time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... O-one more round! I'm very close to
grasping this game!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her luck must not have improved because Eishin
Flash stays in a bad mood for a while even after
their game wraps up.
